Meta.title: NanaiCare | Beauty Salon & Facial Wellness in Amsterdam
Meta.description: A calm, professional studio in Amsterdam for facials, skin health guidance, and curated skincare. Designed and programmed by Daniel Garcia Rojas (dgrcodex) for Sambalab.pro.

Hero.title: Nanai, care that softens pain and sorrow.
Hero.lead: Nanai (Quechua): a very tender caress used to calm pain or sorrow. NanaiCare is a warm, intuitive studio in Amsterdam for body and facial rituals, not a basic template, but a space that feels coherent, human, and close.

Services.label: What we offer
Services.title: Treatments shaped around rhythm, not rush.
Services.subtitle: Every session is paced for listening: your lifestyle, your barrier, your goals.

panel.title: Studio rhythm
panel.body: Quiet music, warmed towels, and language you can understand, no gatekeeping, just care.

items.title: Deep Cleansing Care
items.description: A multi-step skin care treatment designed to go far beyond your daily routine. It purifies the skin and unclogs the pores, removing dead cells and extracting impurities, and leaving you with a fresh, balanced, and radiant skin.

items.title: Sensitive Nanai Care
items.description: This facial treatment is designed to calm, detoxify, strengthen and hydrate the skin barrier, with quality cosmetological products especially formulated for sensitive skin.

items.title: Sculp & Glow Lymphatic Drainage
items.description: Say goodbye to morning puffiness. This gentle, rhythmic massage channels your body’s natural drainage network to flush toxins, release jaw tension, and boost cellular circulation.

items.title: Post Acné Treatment
items.description: Improve the appearance of your skin and feel comfortable and secure of yourself. Here you will find the support that you need with a tailor-made treatment.

items.title: Microneedling with Peptides
items.description: Unlock your Skin's Natural Glow with Microneedling! This minimally invasive treatment uses tiny, precise needles to stimulate collagen and elastin production.

items.title: Clear Skin
items.description: If you suffer from hyperpigmentation like melasma, sunspots or acne scars, in Nanai Care you can press the reset button to peel away years of sun damage.

items.title: Summer Glow & Cryo Hydration
items.description: The Ultimate Summer Melt-Proof Formula. Crafted to rescue sun-drenched skin, this high-performance treatment floods your skin barrier with advanced hydration.

items.title: Nanain Signature Care
items.description: The Ultimate 'Me Time' Obsession. Deep Cleanse & HydraFacial, Lymphatic & Uplifting Massage, Infrared, Aroma & Premium Mask.

items.title: The Sole & Soul Serenety Ritual
items.description: A session of 60 minutes of pure, weightless luxury for head and legs. This targeted dual-action ritual completely lightens heavy lower bodies while melting away chronic tension from the neck up.

items.title: Head to Toe Refreshing Glow Ritual
items.description: The Instant Reset: The ultimate high-performance escape. This 60-minute, dual-action treatment completely relieves heavy lower bodies while unleashing a jaw-dropping facial radiance.

items.title: Back Side Beauty & Relax Ritual
items.description: A session of 50 Minutes of ultimate deep-pore purification and muscle-melting escape for your back.

items.title: Energizing Legs & Feet Ritual
items.description: A session of 45 minutes of revitalizing legs and feet massage designed to banish heaviness and restore vitality to tired limbs.

Testimonials.label: Stories
Testimonials.title: Warm words from people who sit in our chair.

items.quote: I leave softer, inside and out. The space feels intentional, and the advice never feels like a sales pitch.
items.name: Maya R.

items.quote: Finally a place that explains what my skin needs without overwhelm. The massage portion is unreal.
items.name: Jonas V.

items.quote: Luxurious, but grounded. My rosacea-prone skin has never been this steady.
items.name: Elena S.

Wellness.label: Care notes
Wellness.title: Small recommendations with outsized kindness.
Wellness.subtitle: Short, evidence-minded tips you can actually keep, hydration, sleep, sun, and seasonal shifts.

cards.title: Morning light, gentler skin
cards.body: Ten minutes of daylight early supports rhythm, and often helps reactive skin stay calmer through the week.

cards.title: Less friction, more repair
cards.body: Press products in; avoid rubbing dry. Friction is a quiet source of redness many routines overlook.

cards.title: Seasonal barrier check
cards.body: When the canals bite, swap stripping cleansers for cream textures, barrier first, actives second.

Shop.label: Skincare
Shop.title: Curated products for home care.
Shop.subtitle: A tight edit of cleansers, serums, and barrier creams we trust, chosen for real Amsterdam weather and real lives.

About.label: The name
About.title: Nanai Care
About.meaning: Nanai comes from Quechua: a very tender caress with which we try to calm pain or sorrow. That is the heart of this studio, touch with intention, never rush.
About.vision: You asked for a friendly, intuitive, warm website, coherent and far from basic. Sacred Sound palette, Amsterdam presence, and room to grow into booking, charts, and online health forms.
About.logoBrief: A woman’s face with a hand on her head, enclosed in a circle. The name can sit inside the mark or below it.
logoOptions: Mark only: face + hand inside the circle (icon for app and favicon).
Horizontal: symbol left, “Nanai Care” to the right.
Stacked: symbol on top, name underneath (best for mobile header).
About.paletteTitle: Six colors per theme, switch with the button below

meta.title: Treatments, NanaiCare
meta.description: Body, facial, seasonal packages and subscriptions at NanaiCare Amsterdam.

Treatments.label: Treatments
Treatments.title: Body, face, packages & subscriptions
Treatments.lead: Every service from your brief, corporate, facial, seasonal pairs, and memberships, listed clearly so clients can choose with calm.

Policies.label: Booking & payments
Policies.title: Policies that protect your time and ours
Policies.subtitle: As agreed with NanaiCare: deposits, rescheduling, cancellations, and studio-led changes.

items.title: Deposit & advance payment
items.body: 50% of the treatment is paid in advance as a deposit. Payment methods will be integrated in phase 2 (online booking & checkout).

items.title: Cancellation by the client
items.body: If you do not notify at least 24 hours in advance, the 50% deposit is non-refundable. With notice, you may reschedule up to two times or transfer the appointment to another person.

items.title: Cancellation by NanaiCare
items.body: If we must cancel, you may reschedule or receive a full refund of monies paid.

Roadmap.label: Phase 2 · studio tools
Roadmap.title: Next: agenda, charts & health form
Roadmap.subtitle: Your brief also includes operational features, we scope them as phase 2 so the public site can launch first, beautifully.

items.title: Easy booking agenda
items.body: Calendar that is simple to fill in and correct, with your treatment catalogue linked.

items.title: Monthly & annual charts
items.body: Graphs of treatments performed per month and year, plus revenue tracking.

items.title: Payment methods
items.body: Integrated payment options aligned with the 50% deposit workflow.

items.title: Online health & aesthetics form
items.body: Client intake (ficha de salud y estética) available before the visit.

Themes.panelIntro: Six directions for NanaiCare. Compare warmth, contrast, and fonts. Nothing is final until you choose.
Themes.sixColorsHint: Use the button below to switch themes; swatches update live.
Themes.sacredSoundHint: Agreed base · soft blush, sage, calm ink
Themes.sunsetHint: Pinterest dusk · rose, mauve, deep navy

Footer.tagline: NanaiCare, facial wellness & boutique beauty in Amsterdam.

meta.title: Project charter, NanaiCare
meta.description: Scope, roles, and agreed budget reference for the NanaiCare digital project (Sambalab · DGRcodex).

Charter.title: NanaiCare project charter
Charter.lead: Single-page agreement for scope boundaries, responsibilities, and the agreed payment structure. Figures are planning references; final amounts follow the issued invoice.
Charter.overviewP1: Align NanaiCare, Sambalab, and development on what is in and out of scope for the first web phase, and record the agreed budget split (50% + 50%).
Charter.overviewP2: Digital vision: mobile-first, warm and professional, EN / ES / NL, services, stories, wellness notes, and a clear path toward a future skincare shop.
Charter.partyClientBody: Final copy, tone, legal and pricing decisions, appointments, domain purchase, and agreed payments.
Charter.partyAgencyBody: Client liaison, prioritisation, and communication of deliverables.
Charter.partyDevBody: Next.js architecture, i18n, UI aligned with the brand system, deployment, and concise technical handover.
briefBullets: Brand: Nanai Care · Quechua Nanai = tender caress to calm pain or sorrow.
Logo: woman’s face, hand on head, inside a circle; name inside or below (three layout options on site).
Palette: Sacred Sound · domain www.nanaicare.com · warm, intuitive, non-basic site.
Treatments tabs: body, facial, packages (Spring/Summer, Autumn/Winter, Legs & Head, Legs & Face), subscriptions (1 & 6 months).
Policies: 50% deposit upfront; 24h cancellation rule; reschedule ×2 or transfer; Nanai cancellation = reschedule or refund.
Phase 2: booking agenda, monthly/annual treatment & revenue charts, payment methods, online health/aesthetics form.
Charter.briefPlaceholder: Full treatment names and durations are listed on the Treatments page and in docs/NanaiCare-Project-Charter.md.
scopeIn: Phase 1 live site: brand story (Nanai meaning), Sacred Sound UI, EN/ES/NL.
Full treatment catalogue page (body, facial, packages, subscriptions) from client list.
Policies section (deposit, 24h cancellation, reschedule/transfer, studio cancellation).
Charter with budget; deploy on Vercel; GitHub handover.
scopeOut: Booking agenda with easy edit, payment integrations, monthly/annual charts (treatments & revenue).
Full e-commerce shop and native apps unless newly scoped.
Charter.changeBody: Features not listed here, or integrations that require new vendors, are quoted as phase 2 or a written change request. Work that invalidates already approved deliverables may affect timeline and cost.
Charter.rowVat: IVA (19% on base, confirm on invoice)
Charter.budgetNote: Amounts in Chilean pesos (CLP). IVA at 19% and domain cost depend on provider; the issued invoice is the binding reference.
Charter.paymentIntro: Agreed structure: two halves of the indicative total. First half: 50%. Second half: 50% upon the agreed completion milestone.
Charter.weekGoal: Target: settle the outstanding first-half balance this week, as verbally agreed between the parties.
Charter.diagramCaption: Scope view: phase 1 vs optional later work.
Charter.diagramAlt: Flow: Phase 1 delivers Next site, brand UI, deploy; Phase 2 options include e-commerce, bookings, extra legal.

meta.title: Book your appointment — NanaiCare Amsterdam
meta.description: Book your facial, massage or wellness ritual at NanaiCare Amsterdam. Reserve online in minutes.

Booking.title: Book your ritual
Booking.subtitle: Choose your treatment, pick a date and time, and confirm in 3 simple steps.
Booking.step2Title: When would you like to come?
Booking.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Booking.healthNotePlaceholder: Allergies, conditions or anything we should know (optional)
Booking.successBody: We’ve sent a confirmation email to [email] with all the details and a .ics file to add to your calendar.
Booking.noSlots: No time slots available on this day. Please choose another date.
Booking.pickDate: Select a date to see available time slots.
Booking.closedDay: The studio is closed on this day.
Booking.depositNote: A 50% deposit is required to confirm your booking. The studio will contact you to arrange payment.
Booking.cancelPolicy: Free cancellation with at least 24 hours notice.
